news.t: ProShares Launches Only ETF to Target 2x Daily Returns of the S&P 500 Equal Weight Index

holdings.infoBox: URSP is an equity ETF with a total of 507 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra S&P 500 Equal Weight (URSP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Equal Weighted index. The fund offers 2x leveraged exposure to the S&P 500 Equal Weight Index. URSP was launched on Aug 25, 2025 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares Launches Only ETF to Target 2x Daily Returns of the S&P 500 Equal Weight Index
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares launches Ultra S&P 500 Equal Weight (URSP), the only ETF designed to target 2x the daily returns of the S&P 500 Equal Weight Index.
